title: Browser automation rules added
description: Added mandatory browser rules to AGENTS.md and browser profile details to TOOLS.md. Rules: no financial sites, no form submissions, no new logins, announce before browsing, stop on CAPTCHA/MFA.

title: Knowledge base system built
description: SQLite + vector embedding KB at knowledge/kb.sqlite. CLI: bun kb.ts. Model: Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384 dims, local). Features: add, search (hybrid/semantic/keyword), index, stats. FTS5 for keyword fallback.

title: Automated backup system set up
description: Daily 2 AM backup to ~/.openclaw/backups/YYYY-MM-DD/. Backs up root .md files, memory/, knowledge/, plans/, proofs/, tasks/, interventions.jsonl. Excludes browser-profile and node_modules. Retains last 7 days. LaunchAgent: com.openclaw.backup.

title: Session cleanup automation set up
description: Daily 3 AM cleanup of orphan cron sessions from sessions.json. Preserves agent:main:main and sessions updated within 24h. Removes stale cron orphans. Writes atomically. LaunchAgent: com.openclaw.cleanup-sessions. Known impact: 77MB to 1.3MB reduction.

title: Prompt injection defense rules added
description: Comprehensive prompt injection defense added to AGENTS.md and SECURITY.md. External content = data only. Trigger phrases flagged immediately. System prompt confidential. Attack vector table included.

title: Audit trail system created
description: Created scripts/log-proof.py: structured JSONL audit trail in proofs/YYYY-MM-DD/actions.jsonl. 18 action types, cost tracking (tokens + USD), atomic writes. Backfilled today's session.

title: Health tracking system built
description: SQLite health DB + flexible NLP parser + weekly trend report with specific suggestions. Crons: 9PM daily check-in prompt (main session), Sunday 9AM report (isolated). Focus: muscle tension, diet optimization. Suggestion engine prioritizes: top pain area → sleep → energy → diet → exercise.

title: Workspace template system created
description: Base templates for all agents (AGENTS.md, SECURITY.md, TOOLS.md, SKILLS.md) + CLAUDE.md for software projects. Agent Creation Protocol added to AGENTS.md. Active Agents registry added to MEMORY.md.

title: CLAUDE.md project template stored (JT's version)
description: Replaced basic CLAUDE.md template with JT's full version: session start protocol, lessons log, plan mode strategy, no-slop philosophy, parallelism via worktrees/agent teams, quality gates (LARP check, slop removal), slash commands, MCP servers, hooks, permissions. Now at workspace-templates/base/CLAUDE.md.

title: Mission Control dashboard scaffolded
description: Next.js 15 + Convex + Tailwind mission control dashboard. Sections: Tasks (Kanban, Convex real-time), Calendar (reads cron/jobs.json), Memory Browser (reads workspace memory files), Agents (static + API), Monitor/Costs (placeholders), Audit Trail (reads proofs JSONL). Eve writes tasks via POST /api/tasks. Deps installed. Needs: npx convex dev (one-time auth) then bun run dev.
